nodes.context: A gang operating in the Lower Mainland of British Columbia, involved in drug trafficking and violence.
A gang in British Columbia that partnered with the Bacon brothers and later became a Hells Angels puppet gang.
A gang involved in the Lower Mainland drug trade, members arrested with Jamie Bacon in 2006.
Outlaw motorcycle club that orchestrated the Bacon brothers' takeover of the Red Scorpions to create a puppet gang.
Allied with the United Nations gang against the Red Scorpions.
A gang founded by Corey Jason Lal and Edward Narong after breaking away from the Red Scorpions; exterminated in the Surrey Six massacre.
A Calgary gang whose members Billy Ly and Troy Tran were recruited to kill the Bacon brothers.
Multi-ethnic criminal alliance formed in 2010, including Hells Angels, Independent Soldiers, Bacon Brothers, and others.
Criminal group led by the Bacon siblings, involved in drug trafficking and violence in British Columbia.
Montreal and Ottawa-based criminal family involved in the Wolfpack Alliance.
Montreal-based organized crime group involved in drug trafficking.
An Indo-Canadian gang active in Canada, condemned by Jamie Bacon.

edges.context: The Bacon brothers worked with the United Nations gang, but held contempt for its leader.
The Bacon brothers partnered with the Red Scorpions in 2006 and later took leadership control.
The Hells Angels orchestrated the Bacon brothers' takeover to reduce the Red Scorpions to a puppet gang.
Members of both gangs were arrested together at a meeting in 2006.
The Red Scorpions and United Nations gang fought each other in the Lower Mainland gang war from 2007 to 2009.
The Independent Soldiers were a puppet gang of the Hells Angels.
The Hells Angels supplied guns to the United Nations gang during the gang war.
The Dhak-Duhre gang was allied with the United Nations gang against the Red Scorpions.
The Lal gang broke away from the Red Scorpions and was targeted; the Surrey Six massacre exterminated the Lal gang.
Members of the Fresh Off the Boat Killers were recruited to kill the Bacon brothers of the Red Scorpions.
Independent Soldiers acted as proxy for Hells Angels.
Wolfpack Alliance included Hells Angels member Larry Amero as senior partner.
Wolfpack Alliance included Independent Soldiers members James Riach and Randy Naicker.
Wolfpack Alliance included Jonathan Bacon of the Bacon Brothers.
Wolfpack Alliance included the Alkhalil family.
Wolfpack Alliance included Shane Maloney of the West End Gang.
Dhak-Duhre group was allied with the United Nations gang.
Dhak-Duhre gang blamed Wolfpack for murder of Gurmit Dhak and retaliated.
The Bacon Brothers organization has links with the Hells Angels, as noted by the parole board.
Jamie Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance in racist and homophobic language.
Jamie Bacon condemned the Indo-Canadian Brothers' Keepers gang in racist and homophobic language.
